name: Kona Coffee Purveyors
tagline: 100% Kona paired with SF's b.Patisserie pastries — the best coffee in Waikiki, full stop.
parking: Validated parking at International Market Place garage (3 hrs free with purchase)
talkStory: Brandon personally visits every farm he sources from. They partnered with Belinda Leong of b.Patisserie (James Beard-nominated SF bakery) for the pastry program. Go before 9am to beat the Waikiki brunch crowd. Ask the baristas which estate the current pour-over comes from. The upstairs location means most tourists walk right past it.
